<!-- What's missing or annoying right now? -->

<!-- How could this work? Sketch the UX or the API. -->

<!-- Other ways to solve this. Why are they less good? -->

## Impact

<!-- What components would change? Firmware? UI? Hardware? Cloud? -->

- [ ] I'd need help / pairing
- [ ] No, just suggesting
